query: SELECT cn.contactId, cn.content FROM contact_notes cn JOIN contacts c ON cn.contactId = c.id WHERE c.accountId = 390025 AND c.assignedUserId IN (901752, 902504) LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT cn.contactId, cn.content FROM contact_notes cn JOIN contacts c ON cn.contactId = c.id WHERE c.accountId = 390025 AND c.assignedUserId IN (901752, 902504) LIMIT 5;
